title: Revealing 'Mafia Inc.'? Financial Crisis, Organized Crime, and the Birth of New Enterprises

original_result.source: Table 2, Column 5 (new_std_ln, complete model with all controls + north x year interactions). Conley spatial HAC SEs (200km, 11yr). N=924.

notes: Mafia and enterprise formation after 2007 financial crisis. 84 Italian provinces (excl. Sicily, Campania, Calabria). Treatment = mafia_n3 (top tertile of Transcrime Mafia Index). Single treatment date: 2007 (crisis onset). crisis_mafia_n3_int is pre-computed DiD interaction. Stata uses reg2hdfespatial for Conley SEs — R will use clustered SEs (coefficients identical, SEs differ). year_k_north = north indicator x year dummies (macro-region x year FEs). SA disabled (single cohort). CS-NYT not applicable (single treatment date).
